title: Worms Zone .io — Hungry Snake
notes: Meet the updated Wardrobe! We've completely redesigned its look and introduced a rarity system for worms. Each worm now has its own rarity level, which determines how many boosters it starts a match with. We've also made room for new, even more beautiful worms. All coins spent on purchasing removed worms will be automatically refunded to your account.
